description_long: This object consists of a small cluster of wooden barrels of varying sizes, arranged on a patch of green ground. The barrels are cylindrical with visible wood grain textures and are reinforced by dark metal hoops around their circumference. One of the barrels is lying on its side, showing its circular end, while the others are upright. Among the barrels, there is a large stone with a sword embedded in it, the sword featuring a metallic blade and a brown hilt with a gold pommel. The barrels appear hollow and functional as storage containers, typical of those found in urban or medieval settings. The overall scene suggests a utilitarian or decorative grouping, possibly for a park, street corner, or themed urban area.
description: A group of wooden barrels of different sizes, some upright and one on its side, clustered with a stone and a sword embedded in it, all set on a green patch.
description_view_0: Two large upright barrels are prominent, with the sword and stone visible between them.
description_view_1: The barrels are seen from an angle, revealing a smaller barrel and the stone with the sword more clearly.
description_view_2: All barrels, including the smallest, are visible, with the stone and sword centrally positioned.
description_view_3: The side of a barrel is visible, showing its circular end, with the stone and sword in the foreground and two upright barrels behind.
